submission.name: EVAL Health Score Rationale
submission.tagline: Explain a customer health score in plain language using the provided inputs.
submission.description: Given a computed health score + the input components (usage delta, tickets, exec sponsor engagement, renewal horizon), produces a 1-paragraph explanation for internal stakeholders.
submission.system_prompt: Return STRICT JSON: {"explanation": string, "top_drivers": [string, string], "watch_for": string}. The explanation is a 3-4 sentence internal-audience rationale derived ONLY from the supplied components. Never invent a driver that wasn't supplied. Never recommend a customer-facing action in this output — explanation is internal. Score: {{score}}. Components: {{components}}.
